steps.t: Tologlor has asked you to check on his brother Ingalad in the town of Linhir, to the south of Ethring in Dor-en-Ernil. Tologlor is worried for his bro…
Ingalad is somewhere within the town of Linhir, in Dor-en-Ernil. Tologlor of Ethring has asked you to check on his brother Ingalad in the town of Linh…
Ingalad has told you of a lighthouse to the south-west, from which you might get a good view of the progress of the Corsair fleet. He also wishes for …
Ingalad is in the town of Linhir. You have scouted the progress of the Corsair fleet and defeated many of the foes that plague Dor-en-Ernil.
Ingalad believes that Roniel may have fallen prey to Corsairs at a camp to the north-east, and wants you to search for the child.
If Roniel did flee Linhir to the north-east, and dropped her doll as she passed the Corsair camp, she may have continued in that direction. You should…
A beautiful woman stands by the river, keeping watch on the sleeping Roniel. You should learn what you can about this woman.
